# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['java', 'nodejs', 'python', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select project type'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'make build',
            description: 'Custom build command'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'make test',
            description: 'Custom test command'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'make deploy',
            description: 'Custom deploy command'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_TESTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run tests after build'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ON_SUCCESS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Deploy after successful build and tests'
        )
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.RUN_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.DEPLOY_ON_SUCCESS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
